rag_rules: Latched expressions must be used only in component implementations, not in component types
Binary expressions in AGREE must have matching types on both sides of the operator
AGREE guarantees must reference visible features or declared helpers, not unresolved identifiers
generic_rules: AGREE contracts should be placed in appropriate scopes: component types for assumptions/guarantees, implementations for bindings
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic
Ensure type consistency in AGREE declarations and expressions to avoid <error> type issues
Validate that all identifiers in guarantees are either visible features or properly declared helpers
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Left and right sides of '=' in AGREE must be of the same type
Use `and`, `or`, `not(...)`, and `=>` for logical expressions in AGREE
anti_patterns: Do not place latched expressions in component type annexes; they are only valid in implementations
Do not mix incompatible types in binary expressions like bool = int
Do not reference unresolved identifiers in guarantees; ensure all are visible or declared
